claims.statement: hashPassword(char[] password, int iterations) generates a salt using nextBytes.
hashPassword(char[] password, int iterations) derives a hash by calling derive with password, salt, iterations, and KEY_LENGTH_BITS.
claims.source_quote: byte[] hash = derive(password, salt, iterations, KEY_LENGTH_BITS);

claims.statement: hashPassword(char[] password, int iterations) returns a new PasswordHash built from Base64-encoded hash, Base64-encoded salt, and iterations.

entities.name: hashPassword
entities.description: Method that hashes a password with a specified iteration count.

entities.name: derive
entities.description: Method that derives key bytes from a password and salt.

entities.name: nextBytes
entities.description: Method call used to fill a byte array with random bytes.

entities.name: toBase64
entities.description: Method that encodes bytes to Base64.

entities.name: PasswordHash
entities.description: Java record representing a password hash, salt, and iteration count.

relations.description: hashPassword calls derive to compute the password hash.
hashPassword calls nextBytes to generate a random salt.
hashPassword calls toBase64 to encode hash and salt.
